cicd.title: CI/CD Architecture
cicd.content: Designed scalable CI/CD architecture managing 4000+ Jenkins jobs across distributed Azure VMs. Implemented parallel execution, caching strategies, failure isolation and monitoring-driven optimization.

monitoring.title: Monitoring & Observability
monitoring.content: Built centralized monitoring stack using Prometheus and Grafana. Implemented JVM monitoring, custom PromQL queries, threshold tuning, and alert noise reduction strategies.

iac.title: Infrastructure as Code
iac.content: Provisioned Azure infrastructure using modular Terraform scripts with environment isolation, security group configuration and repeatable infrastructure deployment.

automation.title: Automation Scripts
automation.content: Developed advanced parameter-driven shell scripts with validation logic, logging framework and conditional deployment flows reducing manual intervention.

ai.title: AI in DevOps
ai.content: Exploring AI-driven DevOps including log summarization, predictive scaling, alert clustering and intelligent incident response automation.
